item.title: 以数指定年、月、日的日期打印出来
item.author: 作者
item.description: months=[ 'Januray', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December' ] endings=['st','nd','rd']+17*['th']\ +['st','nd','rd']+7*['th']\ +['st'] year=input('Year:') month=input('Month(1-12):') day=input('Day(1-31):') month_number=int(month) day_number=int(day) month_name = months[month_number-1] ordinal=day+endings[day_number-1] print(month_name+' '+ordinal+','+year)
